child_heartbeat.current_step: Remaining gap: law inhabitants (not sockets) for tensor product, tensor morphism functoriality, and unit/associator coherence.

lane_claim: Paper 7 wave8 LEAF WORKER gate6 W3: own exactly `IntertwinersTensorFusion`. You are a leaf worker and must not spawn descendants. Use $autonomous-orchestrator status/reporting conventions, but do not use Codex built-in subagents. Implement intertwiners, tensor product, associativity, and unit laws. Return code + targeted validation, exact typed error, or authority escalation. No roadmap-only output, no docs-only output, no repeated blocker decomposition. Touch only the files needed for this symbol family. Do not set promotion bits true unless upstream receipts are inhabited.
